message:
Running command: # ODB not available as Python module directly.
# Use a TCL/OpenROAD script to fix the bterm ports instead.
# OpenROAD has dbBTerm API we can use in TCL.

cat > /tmp/fix_bterm_ports.tcl << 'ENDSCRIPT'
# Fix multiple PORTs on VDDIO/VSSIO bterms for DRT compatibility.
# Reads ODB from step 32, removes extra ports, writes fixed ODB.

set ::env(SCRIPTS_DIR) /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts
set ::env(STEP_DIR) /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting
set ::env(_TCL_ENV_IN) $::env(STEP_DIR)/_env.tcl

source $::env(_TCL_ENV_IN)
set ::env(SCRIPTS_DIR) /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts

set PDK_LIB /nc/pdk/ciel/sky130/versions/0fe599b2afb6708d281543108caf8310912f54af/sky130A/libs.ref/sky130_fd_sc_hd/lib
set ::env(_PNR_LIBS) "$PDK_LIB/sky130_fd_sc_hd__tt_025C_1v80.lib $PDK_LIB/sky130_fd_sc_hd__ss_100C_1v60.lib $PDK_LIB/sky130_fd_sc_hd__ff_n40C_1v95.lib"
set SRAM_LIB /nc/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/v2.2.0-nc/lib
set ::env(_MACRO_LIBS) "$SRAM_LIB/CF_SRAM_1024x32_tt_180V_25C.lib"
set ::env(_SDC_IN) $::env(PNR_SDC_FILE)
set ::env(_PNR_EXCLUDED_CELLS) ""

source $::env(SCRIPTS_DIR)/openroad/common/io.tcl

# Read the step 32 ODB (with routing guide)
read_db $::env(STEP_DIR)/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb

puts "Fixing multi-port bterms VDDIO and VSSIO..."

set db [ord::get_db]
set block [[$db getChip] getBlock]

foreach net_name {VDDIO VSSIO} {
    set net [$block findNet $net_name]
    if { $net == "NULL" } {
        puts "Net $net_name not found, skipping"
        continue
    }
    set bterms [$net getBTerms]
    foreach bterm $bterms {
        set bterm_name [$bterm getName]
        puts "Processing bterm: $bterm_name (net: $net_name)"
        set bpins [$bterm getBPins]
        set pin_count [llength $bpins]
        puts "  Found $pin_count BPins"
        if { $pin_count > 1 } {
            # Keep only the first bpin, delete the rest
            set first_pin [lindex $bpins 0]
            foreach bpin [lrange $bpins 1 end] {
                puts "  Destroying extra BPin"
                odb::dbBPin_destroy $bpin
            }
            puts "  Kept 1 BPin for $bterm_name"
        }
    }
}

puts "Writing fixed ODB..."
write_db $::env(STEP_DIR)/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb

puts "DONE: Fixed multi-port bterms."
ENDSCRIPT

echo "TCL fix script written"

function.name: execute_bash

# Use a TCL/OpenROAD script to fix the bterm ports instead.
